losses.statement: Unintended motion, collision, injury, or property damage
Loss of timely vehicle control or safe containment
False or non-reproducible safety, scientific, or operational evidence
Unauthorized command authority or security boundary compromise
Operator makes a hazardous decision from ambiguous or stale state

controls.statement: One native plant is the sole final FCU applier.
Only the authenticated Haldir Gate identity may publish the exact final route.
The plant checks command age with its monotonic clock immediately before every write.
NCP wire, profile, session, generation, stream, source, sequence, and bounds fail closed.
One atomic fresh FCU health/state snapshot is checked at apply time.
Frames, units, axes, timestamps, and covariance conventions are typed and golden-vector tested.
The ODD safe-action matrix selects Hold, Land, RTL, inhibit, or disarm from authoritative state.
FCU estimator, fence, data-link, offboard, battery, and emergency failsafes are independently configured and attested.
Renderer, controller, observer, and simulator identities have no generic FCU command capability.
Every boot/reset creates a new epoch/session and cannot resume retained authority.
Payloads, queues, sessions, rates, logs, and evidence spools are bounded with reserved safe capacity.
Missing, late, rejected, expired, and dropped inputs are explicit and never interpreted as nominal.
Accepted, authorized, attempted, FCU-accepted, observed, expired, and safe-state stages are joined by stable identity.
Estimator consistency, divergence, staleness, and numerical failure are explicit degraded states.
Models use immutable signed contracts, calibration evidence, supported ODD, and golden fixtures.
UI vocabulary distinguishes connection, delivery, acceptance, authorization, FCU acceptance, and observation.
Simulation mutation runs under a separate profile/identity and is labeled non-flight evidence.
Mission, mode, arm, takeoff, land, disarm, and reset are typed policy/plant transactions or absent from L1.
Plant braking envelope and independently configured FCU geofence jointly contain boundary approach.
Static inventory and active bypass campaigns fail on any undeclared actuator route.

hazards.title: Motion through an authority bypass

evidence.artifact: signed bypass-campaign report

hazards.residual_risk: The new headless kernel is inert and dependency-isolated, but it is not yet an FCU applier; any unclassified or reachable command surface still blocks L1.

hazards.title: Required safe action is lost or omitted

evidence.artifact: watchdog and FCU-failsafe trace

hazards.residual_risk: A component safety latch cannot select or apply an ODD-specific physical safe action; watchdog, FCU failsafe, and kill/freeze evidence remain absent.

hazards.title: Delayed or expired command remains active

evidence.artifact: monotonic expiry latency distribution
component tests proving half-open local expiry, immutable deadline, generation fencing, invalid-TTL rejection, and clock-regression failure

hazards.residual_risk: Passive local expiry mechanics exist, but there is no command admission, active watchdog scheduling, suspend qualification, immediately-before-write check, safe action, or latency evidence.

hazards.title: Replay, duplicate, or cross-session command is accepted

evidence.artifact: wire/session/restart rejection corpus

hazards.residual_risk: Current wire guards do not establish durable anti-rollback for the live topology.

hazards.title: Command is interpreted in the wrong frame or unit

evidence.artifact: repository CLI invokes the JavaScript manifest, digest, canonical-number, and transform verifier over the shared 32-row velocity-axis corpus
Rust integration parses the same TSV with its canonical-number parser and matches all 32 expected outputs bit-exactly
Rust integration enumerates and rejects all eight directed local/body frame-family pairs without attitude

hazards.residual_risk: The profile-neutral velocity-axis kernel does not carry or prove frame-instance identity, same local origin/datum, or same body reference point; select a canonical deployment frame; or cover attitude, yaw/quaternions, points/translation, covariance, Three.js, degrees/radians, time units, authenticated ingress, apply-time enforcement, or live FCU interpretation.

hazards.title: Stale or inconsistent vehicle state authorizes motion

evidence.artifact: barrier- and acknowledgement-coordinated component test requiring every reader to verify coherent source-sequence, position, and velocity values at staged replacements two and three before the writer continues through 1,000 retained commits
component rejection matrix for closed identity, per-channel sequence, frame/unit, plant-time, numeric, explicit unavailable-state, and reachable closure/poison/counter retained-storage failures
component reader test for missing state, generation rotation, clock regression, deliberately old observations, and increasing ages without freshness classification

component matrix proving nonzero profile-bound exclusive limits, below/equal/above classification for receipt and all seven observation groups, exact-profile mismatch refusal before classification, ownership of the coherent observed commit, and separation of temporal currency from unknown/unavailable health semantics
apply-time race and staleness trace

hazards.residual_risk: A closed immutable in-memory snapshot, context-bound retained channel, strict sequence admission within one publisher/channel instance, coherent plant-monotonic age mechanics, and an exact-profile-bound exclusive captured-read age classifier exist. Source/profile/frame identities and proposed limits remain caller-supplied structural assertions, not authenticated provenance or approval; a caller can recreate another channel with the same epoch and reset its in-memory high-water; real FCU sampling and multi-message coherence are unproved; no approved freshness/health policy or aggregate verdict exists; lifecycle can rotate and time can advance after load; and no immediately-before-write governor, adapter, or independently attested FCU failsafe consumes the assessment.

hazards.title: Generic Hold or ESTOP selects an unsafe physical action

evidence.artifact: state/trigger/action/observation matrix

hazards.residual_risk: Protocol hold remains distinct from physical safety.

hazards.title: Router, MAVROS, FCU, or data-link loss leaves unsafe output

evidence.artifact: partition/reboot/failsafe trace

hazards.residual_risk: Fallback behavior is not pinned to an FCU parameter manifest.

hazards.title: Estimator or fusion divergence appears nominal
cause_categories: fusion configuration or producer software drift

evidence.artifact: scenario NIS/NEES and degradation results
component test for one deterministic frozen-prior ledger and common consistency projection
component test that missing/wrong source-frame identity remains explicitly incomparable
component test that unsynchronized, duplicate, out-of-order, and per-channel nonmonotonic inputs cannot claim frozen-v1 evidence
component test that invalid internal gate math emits unsupported_filter without fabricated numeric gate or v1 evidence
component test that extreme finite measurements fail before evidence timing state mutates

hazards.residual_risk: The immutable effective config and executable are pinned; the exact-time frozen-prior ledger, computational envelope, and invalid-gate refusal are component-tested. Registry transform/calibration artifacts are not executed or verified, and these regressions are not calibrated system evidence.

hazards.title: Model failure or miscalibration creates an unsafe decision

evidence.artifact: model manifest and calibration report

hazards.residual_risk: No approved immutable model currently supports an L1 decision.

hazards.title: Missing, censored, stale, or dropped evidence appears nominal

evidence.artifact: drop/late/missing/rejected replay bundle
component test showing a full lane consumes sequence identity, reports a drop, and degrades/truncates the frame summary
component test showing heartbeat admission remains independent of a saturated outcome lane
component test that registry input trimming keeps the newest measurements, counts loss, and degrades/truncates the admitted frame
renderer component test that accumulated buffer overflow is reported rather than presenting survivors as a nominal frame
component test that whole overflow clusters are rejected and close a degraded/truncated frame before recovery
component test that stale/nonmonotonic channel time cannot masquerade as comparable v1 evidence

hazards.residual_risk: Producer outcomes, misses, summaries, exact-time refusal, upstream/track-cap loss degradation, sequence gaps, lane drops, sticky degradation, and heartbeats are component-visible. The frozen wire summary lacks numeric upstream/cluster-loss attribution; no deployed receiver assembler enforces registry agreement or heartbeat deadlines; and local puts are not delivery/acceptance evidence.

hazards.title: Resource exhaustion starves watchdog or emergency handling

evidence.artifact: rate/session/disk overload timing trace
component stress test showing an eight-value drop-oldest queue retains the final eight of 100 submissions and reports exactly 92 drops
component tests for independent bounded drop-new evidence lanes and explicit sticky loss accounting
component test enforcing the native 512-measurement batch ceiling before the fusion engine lock
component test for deterministic whole-cluster rejection at the 1,024-live-track capacity and bounded recovery
component test decomposing disconnected finite assignment components
component test short-circuiting a maximum-size all-infinite assignment matrix
component test proving an invalid record prevents every serialized write in that archive batch
component test proving flush failure is reported to the caller used by the degrading archive worker
active archive saturation, regular-file policy, slow/special-path behavior, archive-specific health, and finite-exit trace

hazards.residual_risk: The inert kernel, fusion batch/live-track/numeric domains, sparse/all-infinite assignment cases, Galadriel NCP lanes, and active PID JSONL admission have component bounds; the configured ncp sink is preflighted, batches are validated/serialized before writing, and worker write/flush failure degrades the epoch and stops that worker. The writer may still block beyond its two-second exit wait, archive loss lacks a dedicated counter, the no-producer fusion job waits for synchronous append/flush, router/receiver receive-size limits are unproven, and no watchdog task, reserved scheduler capacity, receiver heartbeat-deadline proof, or combined-load timing evidence exists.

hazards.title: Restart or reconnect resurrects stale authority

evidence.artifact: controller/Gate/router/plant/MAVROS/FCU restart report
component lifecycle test showing revocation rotates the process-local generation and rejects queued work from the previous generation
component lifecycle test showing shutdown rotates the process-local generation when a successor is representable
component lifecycle test showing maximum-generation shutdown remains terminal without wrapping or later mutation

hazards.residual_risk: Process-local lifecycle generations reject stale queued events and the producer creates a fresh randomized process epoch, but durable boot anti-rollback, authenticated principal binding, retained transport behavior, and the complete live restart topology do not exist.

hazards.title: Operator confuses connection or delivery with applied state
cause_categories: producer published-counter interpreted as receiver delivery

evidence.artifact: scenario usability and error-rate report

hazards.residual_risk: No staged command/effect UI currently exists.

hazards.title: Gazebo or local mutation contaminates flight evidence

evidence.artifact: binary/identity/route disposition report

hazards.residual_risk: Simulation capabilities remain present in the current application.

hazards.title: Mission, mode, arm, takeoff, land, or disarm bypasses policy

evidence.artifact: service/mode/mission negative campaign

hazards.residual_risk: Current production renderer/native surfaces no longer expose these operations, but the future L1 adapter/topology and adversarial bypass campaign do not yet exist.

hazards.title: Geofence is crossed despite a numeric clamp

evidence.artifact: worst-case boundary approach suite

hazards.residual_risk: No vehicle-specific braking model or FCU fence attestation exists.
